title: The Royal Tutor Arrives
overview: The kingdom of Glanzreich is at the height of prosperity. The palace employs a tutor to give its princelings an exhaustive education and groom them into fit candidates for the throne, and the prestigious post of royal tutor is bestowed upon only the best and brightest teachers from throughout the kingdom. When Heine Wittgenstein arrives at Weisburg Palace to take charge of four picture-perfect princes as the new royal tutor, he quickly learns that he’ll have his work cut out for him--for looks and reputations can be most deceiving indeed. Can Heine whip them into shape?

title: The Prince Interviews
overview: Royal tutor Heine has been tasked with grooming four princes into potential kings. He’s interviewed the proud Prince Leonhard, but three more princes await: the highly intelligent Bruno, freewheeling Licht, and perpetually-glaring Kai. With each prince's personality as unique as the last, interviewing them will prove to be anything but straightforward...

title: You Don't Need to Accept Me
overview: Heine has finished interviewing all four princes and is ready to begin his first lesson, but will his young charges all assemble for it? And how did they do on their tests?!

title: The Princes Go to Town
overview: Today's lesson: an incognito field trip into the royal capital! The sheltered princes are excited right out of the gate, but it looks like they might be scheming something behind their tiny teacher's back...

title: Assailed by the Greatest of Trials
overview: When King Viktor--also known as the war hero king--returns to the palace after a long time away, he summons Heine and the princes for an audience. But he isn't quite what one might imagine from his nickname... and he has some choice words for his tutor-spurning sons, especially Leonhard! With his claim to the throne on the line, can Leonhard get through the trial his father puts before him?

title: At Cafe Mitter Meyer
overview: When he was a sickly child, Licht was always waiting in his bed for a certain person to visit... While strolling about the city one day, Heine steps inside a charming cafe--and the waiter who greets him is Prince Licht's spitting image! Is Licht's secret still safe, or is he in big trouble with the king?

title: The Whereabouts of a Dream
overview: From a young age, Prince Bruno has poured his utmost efforts into his studies to catch up with the crown prince who everyone saw as a genius. So when little brother Leonhard shows signs of genius, too--however unbelievable that may be--he panics. Can Heine help the brainiac prince decide what he really wants out of life?

title: A Timid Heart
overview: Ever since the king pointed out Prince Kai's communication problems, the second prince has been confused about how exactly to go about improving them. Professor Heine and the prince's brothers have some advice for him, but can Kai muster the courage to put it into practice?

title: The Price of the Past
overview: One year ago, Prince Kai was suspended from military school for violent misconduct. Now the incident is back to haunt him in the form of a tabloid article. Can Kai overcome his past by truly confronting it?

title: The Professor I Don't Know
overview: Little by little, the problem princes have been facing their flaws and learning more about themselves as Professor Heine grooms them for the throne. But when Count Rosenberg makes another appearance, they realize there's one thing they still know nothing about: the royal tutor himself...

title: The Pair's Promise
overview: Professor Heine sends the princes on an assignment to investigate rumors of a criminal in the palace, and the truth shocks them.

title: The Last Lesson
overview: Heine has resigned from the post of royal tutor, and the search for his replacement is underway. Can the princes prove that they’ve matured under his tutelage?
